Login_Subtitle: Access your local password vault securely.
Login_NoAccount_Text: Need an account? Register from here.
Register_Subtitle: Set up your profile and start saving passwords.
Validation_Email_Invalid: Please enter a valid email address.
Validation_PasswordName_Required: Please enter a name for the saved password.
Passwords_Subtitle: Create, inspect, reveal, update, and remove the passwords stored in your vault.
Passwords_Empty_Description: Create your first password entry to start using the vault.
Passwords_Details_Empty_Description: Select a password from the list to see more details, or leave the list without a selection.
Passwords_Editor_PasswordHint_Create: Enter the password you want to store securely.
Passwords_Editor_PasswordHint_Edit: The current password is not loaded. Leave this empty to keep it unchanged, or reveal it if you want to edit the current value.
Profile_Subtitle: Review your account data and manage profile and security settings.
Profile_Danger_Description: Deleting your account permanently removes your local user record and stored data.
Profile_DeletePassword_Placeholder: Enter your password to confirm account deletion
Profile_Devices_Description: Manage the devices linked to your profile. You can rename them, enable or disable synchronization for each one, and disconnect devices you no longer use.
Profile_Devices_Empty_Description: The current device will appear here after the device list is refreshed.
Profile_Device_NameRequired: The device name cannot be empty.
Profile_Device_NameSaved: The device name has been saved.
Profile_Device_SyncTurnedOn: Synchronization has been enabled for this device.
Profile_Device_SyncTurnedOff: Synchronization has been disabled for this device.
Profile_Device_Disconnected: The device has been disconnected from your profile.
Profile_Device_Disconnect_Warning: Only continue if you really want to detach this device from your profile. After detaching it, you should not make further account changes on that device, because during the next synchronization your profile will be removed from it.
Profile_LocalSync_Warning: This setting applies to the whole current device, not only to this user. It turns synchronization on or off for the device itself, but you can turn it back on at any time.
Profile_LocalSync_OnSuccess: Synchronization has been turned on for this device.
Profile_LocalSync_OffSuccess: Synchronization has been turned off for this device.
Passwords_Reveal_Hint: The actual password is not loaded or shown until you explicitly request it.
Login_DeviceTransfer_Title: Bring your profile from another device
Login_DeviceTransfer_Description: Use this when your profile already exists on another device on the same local network. This device will show a short one-time code. On your already signed-in device, open Profile > Linked devices, choose Add device, and enter this code. After the profile data is copied, you can sign in here with your existing account password.
Login_DeviceTransfer_CodeDescription: Keep this screen open and enter this code on the device where you are already signed in. The code is temporary and only works on the same local network.
Login_DeviceTransfer_Waiting: Waiting for the other device to confirm the code and copy the profile data...
Login_DeviceTransfer_SuccessMessage: Your profile data has been copied to this device. Press OK, then sign in with your existing account password.
Login_DeviceTransfer_ErrorMessage: The profile transfer could not be completed.
Login_DeviceTransfer_CodeReady: The code is ready. Enter it on the device where you are already signed in.
Profile_Device_Add_Description: Open the sign-in screen on the new device, choose the option to sign in from another device, then enter the connection code shown there. Both devices must be on the same local network.
Profile_Device_Add_Code_Label: Connection code from the new device
Profile_Device_AddSyncDisabled: This device cannot add another device while its own synchronization is turned off. Turn synchronization back on for the current device first.
Profile_Device_AddSuccess: The new device has been added and the initial profile data transfer has completed.
Profile_Device_Add_CodeRequired: Enter the connection code shown on the new device.
Shell_ProfilePasswordChangedLoggedOut: Your profile password was changed on another device, so you were logged out automatically. Sign in again with your new credentials.
Shell_ProfileRemovedLoggedOut: This profile is no longer linked to this device, so you were logged out automatically.
Shell_SessionExpired: Your session expired. Please sign in again.
Error_Generic: Error: The operation could not be completed. Please try again.
Error_InvalidInput: Error: The provided data is invalid or incomplete.
Error_InvalidCredentials: Error: The username or password is incorrect.
Error_InvalidSession: Error: Your session has expired or is invalid. Please sign in again.
Error_NotFound: Error: The requested item could not be found.
Error_LimitReached: Error: The allowed limit has been reached.
Error_DataIntegrity: Error: The data is corrupted or could not be verified.
Error_DeviceIdentity: Error: The device identity is not initialized.
Passwords_Editor_Closed_Description: Use the list actions to add a new password or edit an existing one.
Passwords_SearchEmpty_Description: No passwords match the current search. Change the search text or sort order.
Passwords_Editor_PasswordHint_Revealed: The current password has been loaded into the field and can be edited.
Passwords_DeleteConfirm_Message: Are you sure you want to delete this password: “{0}”? This action cannot be undone.
Passwords_ColorPicker_Description: Set the password color with sliders or by entering an ARGB/RGB hex color code manually. Examples: #FFFFD700, #FFD700, or #FD0.
Passwords_ColorPicker_InvalidCode: Invalid color code. Use #RGB, #ARGB, #RRGGBB, or #AARRGGBB format.
Profile_Device_SearchEmpty_Description: Try a different device name or status.
Profile_EditPersonalInfo_Description: Change your name and email address.
Profile_ChangeUsername_Description: Change the sign-in name used for your profile.
Profile_ChangeMasterPassword_Description: Change the master password for this account.
Profile_DeleteAccount_Warning_Title: Are you sure you want to delete your profile?
Profile_DeleteAccount_FinalWarning: This action cannot be undone. The local user record and stored data for this profile will be permanently removed from this device. Continue only if you are completely sure.
